checks_json:
["\033[0;31m", "set -e", "🔍 Running comprehensive validation...", "
    ERRORS=$((ERRORS + 1))
    continue
  fi

  # Validate plugin.json against schema if applicable
  if [[ ", ".name", "name", ".version", "version", ".description", "description", ".author", "author", "keys - [", " ]; then
      echo -e ", "
      echo ", " | while read -r field; do
        echo -e ", "$json_file", "hooks", "$TARGET_DIR", " -eq 0 ]; then
  echo -e ", "
fi
echo ", "${YELLOW}⚠️  Python3 not found - skipping frontmatter validation${NC}", "  Checking: $md_file", "$TARGET_DIR", "${GREEN}✅ No duplicate shortcuts${NC}", ".agents", "$TARGET_DIR", " -eq 0 ]; then
  echo -e ", "$TARGET_DIR", " -eq 0 ]; then
  echo -e ", "━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━", "
echo ", "
    WARNINGS=$((WARNINGS + 1))
  fi
done

echo ", " -eq 0 ] && [ ", " -eq 0 ]; then
  echo -e ", " -eq 0 ]; then
  echo -e ", "
  echo ", "
  exit 0
else
  echo -e ", "
  echo "]
["enforce pnpm for root", "enforce npm for marketplace"]
["total bundle size", "largest file size", "build time", "route count"]

["plugin.json", "$plugin_name: agents/ exists but no .md files", "$agent_file", "
            agent_violations+=(", ")
            has_violation=true
            ((non_compliant_agents++))
            continue
        fi

        # Extract frontmatter
        frontmatter=$(awk ", "$frontmatter", "$plugin_name/$agent_name: Description too short", "    ✓ description: Present ($desc_length chars)", "description", ")
            has_violation=true
        fi

        # Check for capabilities field (RECOMMENDED)
        if echo ", "$plugin_name/$agent_name: Empty capabilities list", "    ℹ No capabilities defined (recommended but not required)", "$plugin_name/$agent_name: No heading", "$content_after_frontmatter", "$plugin_name/$agent_name: Minimal content", "    ✓ Content: $content_lines lines", "AGENT WARNINGS (${#agent_warnings[@]}):", "${agent_warnings[@]}", "
    done
fi

echo "]

["plugin.json", "$plugin_name: commands/ exists but no .md files", "$cmd_file", "
            command_violations+=(", ")
            has_violation=true
            ((non_compliant_commands++))
            continue
        fi

        # Extract frontmatter
        frontmatter=$(awk ", "$plugin_name/$cmd_name: Description too short", "    ✓ description: Present ($desc_length chars)", "description", ")
            has_violation=true
        fi

        # Check for optional fields in frontmatter
        if echo ", "$plugin_name/$cmd_name: No heading", "$content_after_frontmatter", "$plugin_name/$cmd_name: Minimal content", "    ✓ Content: $content_lines lines", "COMMAND WARNINGS (${#command_warnings[@]}):", "${command_warnings[@]}", "
    done
fi

echo "]

["plugin.json", "$plugin_json", "
            structure_warnings+=(", "$plugin_dir/commands", "
            structure_warnings+=(", "$plugin_dir/agents", "
            structure_warnings+=(", "$plugin_dir/README.md", "
        structure_warnings+=(", "STATUS: ❌ STRUCTURE VIOLATIONS", "STATUS: ⚠ COMPLIANT WITH WARNINGS", "STRUCTURE WARNINGS (${#structure_warnings[@]}):", "${structure_warnings[@]}", "
    done
fi

echo "]

["$1", "
        critical_violations+=(", ")
        has_critical=true
        ((plugins_with_violations++))
        continue
    fi

    # Check REQUIRED fields

    # 1. Check name field
    name=$(jq -r ", "name", "name", "version", "version", "description", "description", "
            minor_warnings+=(", "
            minor_warnings+=(", ")
            has_minor=true
        fi
    fi

    # Check homepage
    homepage=$(jq -r ", "
            minor_warnings+=(", ")
            has_minor=true
        fi
    fi

    # Check repository
    repository=$(jq -r ", "
            minor_warnings+=(", ")
            has_minor=true
        fi
    fi

    # Check license
    license=$(jq -r ", "
            minor_warnings+=(", ")
            has_major=true
        else
            echo ", ")
            has_major=true
        else
            echo ", ")
                has_major=true
            else
                echo ", ")
                has_major=true
            else
                echo ", "STATUS: ⚠ COMPLIANT WITH WARNINGS", "
echo ", "MINOR WARNINGS (${#minor_warnings[@]}):", "${minor_warnings[@]}", "
    done
fi

echo "]

[")
        score -= 15

    # Check for trigger phrases
    trigger_patterns = [", ")
        score -= 15

    # Check for vague terms
    vague_terms = [", "name", "name", "description"]
